questions.q: What is the minimum number of people required in the source audience to create a Lookalike?
questions.explanation: 100 people from a SINGLE country is the minimum. Recommended 1,000-50,000 for quality.

options: The top 1% most SIMILAR to the source (maximum similarity, smaller reach)
questions.explanation: 1% = maximum similarity to the source. 10% = more reach but less similar.

questions.q: What is the maximum number of Custom Audiences per ad account?
questions.explanation: 500 Custom Audiences maximum per ad account.
On by default. It is turned off with 'Switch to original audience options' or 'Further limit the reach of your ads'.

questions.q: You want Advantage+ Catalog Ads for a store with 30 SKUs. What is the recommended minimum number of products per Product Set?
questions.explanation: 20 products minimum recommended so the ML has enough material.
